founder_order: Ticks must run on Cloudflare (more reliable than GitHub). Independent verifier from the second Cloudflare account must check the loops.

responsibilities: one-shot repository_dispatch key2_custody_established when bootstrap key1 dies
one-shot repository_dispatch liveness_48h_close when window closes

independent_verifier.independence: runs on the second Cloudflare account, off-account from every loop it audits, so a main-account outage cannot silence the audit
checks: two-times-interval staleness of each loop last_fired_at

github_actions_demoted.note: GitHub Actions is no longer a recurring scheduler for these loops. Both former cron workflows now run only as one-shot apply jobs fired by the Cloudflare tick via repository_dispatch.

closed_loop: Observe (probe loops) -> Detect (staleness + key2 custody) -> Critique (verdict) -> Repair (one-shot dispatch) -> Re-deploy (apply job) -> Observe (verifier re-audits)
forbidden: recurring github-actions cron for these loops
